REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $2,176.00 FOR TRANSACTION W0608509D010 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO KERRI MARTIN, DOC1901255932, WARRANT #38002025, DATED JUN-25-2008
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, KERRI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, KERRI MARTIN, MILAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YATES, EDWARD $2,019.00 PRINCIPAL, $157.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,176.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT DID NOT FULLY COMPLY WITH CAL. CIV. CODE 1950.5 (G)(3) BY FAILING TO INDENTIFY THE SOURCE OF THE ESTIMATE ON WHICH THE DEDUCTION WAS BASED. THE EVIDENCE NOT ADEQUATELY SUPPORT THE DEDUCTION FOR THE ALLEDGED LATE RENT PAYMENTS. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT DEFENDANT MADE THE DEDUCTIONS IN BAD FAITH AND THEREFORE DOES NOT AWARD STATUTORY DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-21-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED FORM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
